name: rom_entry
notes: Entry point stored in the cartridge header

name: bios_resume_jump
notes: Direct jump to BIOS address 0xFF1800

name: vblank_handler
notes: Installed in the Vertical_Blanking_Int vector at RAM 0x6FCC

name: wait_for_counter_400A
notes: Wait loop involving RAM byte 0x400A

name: engine_task_init
notes: Initializes engine subsystems then becomes the per-frame engine task

name: vblank_frame_update_callback
notes: Optional VBlank callback that updates scroll and graphics state

name: check_soft_reset_chord
notes: Restarts through the cartridge entry point when A B and Option are held together

name: initial_ram_table
notes: Copied to RAM at 0x6FB8 during startup

name: initialize_task_scheduler
notes: Initializes the fixed-size task pool and installs the first task

name: run_task_scheduler
notes: Calls each task function through the linked task list forever

name: allocate_task
notes: Removes a task node from the free list and links it after the current task

name: link_task_after_current
notes: Initializes and links a task node after the current XIZ task

name: register_static_task
notes: Links a caller-supplied task node and marks it as statically allocated

name: frontend_manager_task_init
notes: Drives boot presentation attract flow menus and task launches

name: update_pause_menu
notes: Handles Option presses and dispatches the active pause-menu state

name: upload_sprite_state_to_vram
notes: Copies cached sprite attributes and optional palette numbers into K2GE VRAM

name: poll_controller_state
notes: Reads Controller_Status and updates current pressed and repeat state at 0x4D40

name: update_button_state
notes: Updates one six-byte current pressed and key-repeat record

name: bios_com_on_rts
notes: Invokes BIOS vector 0x15 VEC_COMONRTS when BIOS services are available

name: bios_com_off_rts
notes: Invokes BIOS vector 0x16 VEC_COMOFFRTS when BIOS services are available

name: upload_palettes_if_dirty
notes: Uploads cached background and palette state to K2GE registers when marked dirty

name: upload_window_registers
notes: Copies cached window coordinates into K2GE window registers

name: velocity_from_angle_and_speed
notes: Uses lookup tables to convert an angle and scalar speed into X and Y velocity

name: integrate_object_y_position
notes: Adds signed 8.8 Y velocity at offset 0x1C to the 24-bit Y position

name: integrate_object_x_position
notes: Adds signed 8.8 X velocity at offset 0x1A to the 24-bit X position

name: player_try_jump
notes: Tests newly pressed A or B and requests the jump state

name: player_task_init
notes: Initializes the player task and its state machine at RAM 0x6708

name: player_enter_idle
notes: Clears player velocity and enters the standing state

name: player_state_idle
notes: Handles standing look crouch and transition to movement from controller input

name: player_enter_crouch
notes: Selects the crouching animation and compact collision bounds then enters the crouch state

name: player_state_crouch
notes: Holds crouch while Down remains pressed and accepts A or B to start a spindash

name: update_spindash_charge
notes: Decays the stored charge and adds 0x200 for each new A or B press up to 0x800

name: player_enter_spindash_charge
notes: Starts the spindash sound and animation then clears the stored charge

name: player_state_spindash_charge
notes: Charges while Down is held and converts charge through a speed table on release

name: player_enter_walk
notes: Initializes the walking state and animation

name: player_state_walk
notes: Applies ground acceleration collision and animation while moving

name: player_enter_roll
notes: Selects the shorter rolling collision bounds and enters rolling movement

name: player_state_roll
notes: Applies rolling ground physics collision jump checks and exit at low speed

name: player_enter_jump
notes: Applies jump velocity along the surface normal and enters airborne movement

name: set_player_airborne_flags
notes: Sets task flag bit 1 clears bit 7 and detaches the player from the supporting object

name: player_enter_airborne
notes: Applies airborne flags and changes the task function to the common airborne state

name: player_state_airborne
notes: Applies airborne movement gravity collision and animation

name: relax_airborne_surface_angle
notes: Rotates the stored surface angle four units per gameplay tick back toward zero

name: load_collision_radii
notes: Copies object horizontal and vertical collision radii into shared collision scratch values

name: resolve_ground_surface_collision
notes: Probes around the current surface quadrant and snaps the player to the selected ground wall or ceiling

name: check_ground_attachment
notes: Uses paired surface sensors to update angle and reports when the player has lost contact

name: resolve_airborne_collision
notes: Integrates airborne movement then resolves floor ceiling and wall contacts from velocity direction

name: level_manager_task_init
notes: Initializes the persistent level manager task at RAM 0x6754

name: set_player_state_if_active
notes: Replaces the player task function when gameplay is in an active state

name: gameplay_session_task_init
notes: Loads a selected stage and creates level-manager and player tasks

name: vblank_restart_timer0_if_enabled
notes: Restarts TLCS-900H Timer 0 when the flag at 0x68E8 is nonzero

name: service_z80_command_queue
notes: Services the TLCS-900H to Z80 communication ring buffer

name: advance_z80_command_queue
notes: Advances the Z80 command queue read index modulo 16

name: free_task_head
notes: Pointer to the first free task node in the fixed task pool

name: engine_task
notes: First task node and linked-list anchor initialized at boot

name: active_task_count
notes: Count adjusted when dynamic tasks are allocated and freed

name: controller_state_current
notes: Current raw active-high controller bits

name: controller_state_pressed
notes: Bits that transitioned from released to pressed this poll

name: controller_state_pressed_or_repeat
notes: New presses plus generated key-repeat events

name: controller_repeat_counter
notes: Frame counter used to generate repeated button events

name: controller_repeat_delay
notes: Repeat threshold initialized to six frames

name: player_task
notes: Static player task node and state beginning at this RAM address

name: level_manager_task
notes: Static level-manager task node beginning at this RAM address

name: timer0_restart_enabled
notes: Controls the Timer 0 restart performed during VBlank
